summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YABBAI v5 Solana DeFi ecosystem. All 16 backend API tests pass. All 7 YABBAI v5 pages load correctly with proper functionality. Navigation toggle between YABBAI v5 and Gold Hunter works.
critical_code_review_comments: All YABBAI v5 endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
APY formula correctly implemented: risk*8+200 to risk*15+400
Mission yield ticking works via POST /tick endpoint
Agent chat falls back to Emergent LLM (GPT-5.2) when xAI unavailable
Treasury wallets correctly configured with provided Solana addresses

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 YABBAI v5 pages + Gold Hunter navigation work)

seed_data_creation: Test missions created during testing, early access leads saved
context_for_next_testing_agent: YABBAI v5 fully functional. All endpoints working. xAI Grok falls back to Emergent LLM. Pump scanner returns SIMULATED token data. Yield tokens are SIMULATED projections at $0.001 each.

mocked_apis.pump_scanner: Returns simulated token data (not real Solana data)
mocked_apis.xai_grok: Falls back to GPT-5.2 via Emergent Universal Key

backend: GET /api/yabbai/pump-scanner - Returns 5 tokens with scores + Jupiter links ✓
POST /api/yabbai/missions - Creates mission with APY formula ✓

Pump Scanner - 5 tokens with scores + Jupiter swap links ✓
